title: Lock Prize Pool Pool
explanation: To finalize and activate your PrizeRace sprint, you must lock the total prize pool amount in the smart-contract secure vault. These funds will be automatically distributed to the top finishers upon sprint completion.
verified_success: Deposit successfully verified! Your sprint is now LIVE and broadcasting to users.
warning_text: Do not send funds from central exchanges. Only use non-custodial wallets like Tonkeeper, Tonhub, or Telegram Wallet. Once sent, funds cannot be recalled until the sprint concludes.
